fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection on line 77 incorrectly uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), treating touching intervals as non-overlapping. The logic should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to correctly identify adjacent windows as conflicts.

spec.expr: any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline) == any(not (b__1 < s or a__1 > e) for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The buggy overlap condition should yield the same result as the correct condition where touching intervals conflict.

spec.expr: all(b__1 < s or a__1 > e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If a booking is made (i.e., no conflict is detected), the new window must not have any overlap with existing ones, including touching boundaries.
The start time of a valid window must be strictly less than its end time.

spec.expr: __cbfl_result[0] == (not any(not (window[1] < s or window[0] > e) for s, e in timeline))

constraints.intent: The success status must correctly reflect whether an overlap exists according to the specification (touching is a conflict).
